Localization.Description: A user changed a registry key that ensures the security of MS Office applications. Attackers can use MS Office macros to gain persistence in the system.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed the registry key that allows you to to disable macro usage notifications in application {reason} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the registry key that allows you to to disable notifications about programmatic access to Microsoft Outlook on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the registry key that allows you to run any macro in application {reason} on host {event_src.host}
